calendar.matters:
MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2004 Continued To Mar-18-04 At 08:45 A.M. In Dept 611
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-candace yount, 8:48AM: c/c for settlement conference. Present are David Blumenfeld counsel for plaintiff and Joel Liberson counsel for defendants. Plaintiff Gilbert Go and defendants Hoang Nguyen and Siu Tran are also present. Parties have reached a stipulated settlement and sign it in open court. Plaintiff and defendant state for the record that they understand and agree to the terms of the settlement.
8:55AM: there being no further matters for the record court adjourns.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha.
David Blumenfeld, Esq., for Plaintiff Gilbert Go, also present.
Joel Liberson, Esq., for Defendant Hoang Nguyen, also present.
Parties met in chambers, unable to reached a settlement.
The Settlement Conference is taken off-calendar.
Trial date confirmed.
